projectDescription: A browser-based tool that finds and ranks the best open-source GitHub repositories for any niche, powered by AI summaries and multi-signal scoring.
keyFeatures: Smart GitHub repository discovery using multi-signal ranking
Language, star count, recency, and fork filters
Quick search suggestion chips for common queries
Sort results by Score, Stars, or Recent activity
Secure Groq API key storage in localStorage (never transmitted)
publicApiSurface: scoreRepo(repo, query) — scores a repo 0-100 using multiple signals
scoreGrade(score) — returns letter grade and CSS class for a score
generateAISummaries(repos, query) — calls Groq API to generate summaries
search() — main search function triggered by user input
quickSearch(query) — programmatic search from suggestion chips
